commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 3:14 And he made the veil of blue, and purple, and crimson, and fine linen, and wove cherubim into it. Abulensis places it between the court and the holy: but Jansenius would have it before the holy of holies. It seems rather that there was a veil in both places, (Barad. ; Menochius) as Josephus ( viii. ) clearly intimates; and St. Paul speaks of the second veil, Hebrews ix. It is not certain which of them was torn at the death of Jesus Christ, Matthew xxvii. Cherubims; extraordinary figures.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
